38typedef struct {
39 const char* name;
40 value_t value;
41} property_t;
42
50static inline void property_print(const property_t* property, int (*print_func)(const char*, ...), const char* indent) {
51 (void)print_func("%s%s: ", indent, property->name);
52 value_print(&property->value, print_func);
53 (void)print_func("\n");
54}
55
56#ifdef __cplusplus
57}
58#endif
